title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
description: The system could be vulnerable to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks if it processes malicious input that consumes excessive system resources (CPU, memory, bandwidth). This could render the system unavailable to legitimate users.
affected_component: Web Application Server, Database Server, Network Infrastructure
attack_vector: Attackers sending specially crafted requests designed to overwhelm the system's resources.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Use a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious traffic.
Optimize the system's code and database queries to reduce resource consumption.
